title: Water or Dock First
intendedTensionBeat: The water-threatened route is urgent, but taking every route clear immediately creates dock risk.
intendedReleaseBeat: A planned dock-stabilizing clear during the water race makes the endangered rescue feel earned.
expectedPath: Advance the urgent water route, stabilize dock with a clean triple at the right moment, then finish the endangered puppy before pivoting.
expectedFailMode: Player either overprotects dock and loses water tempo, or rushes the route and overflows before rescue.
designNotes: Harder tradeoff, still readable. Do not let dock become the whole level; it should serve the water-order decision.
